testcase.name: test_netflix_movie
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_networks_tmdb.py:52: in test_netflix_movie assert it["type"] == "movie" E AssertionError: assert 'series' == 'movie' E E - movie E + series

testcase.name: test_hbo_includes_marquee_titles

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least one of GoT/Succession/Last of Us in HBO top 3 pages assert set()

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_networks_tmdb.py:80: in test_hbo_includes_marquee_titles assert found, "Expected at least one of GoT/Succession/Last of Us in HBO top 3 pages" E AssertionError: Expected at least one of GoT/Succession/Last of Us in HBO top 3 pages E assert set()

testcase.name: test_invalid_type_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_networks_tmdb.py:105: in test_invalid_type_400 assert r.status_code == 400 E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
